recommended_strategy: Immediate demo booking with senior consultant
reasoning: High budget, urgent timeline, clear ERP use case, strong operational pain, decision-maker role.

response.subject: ERP Solution for ABC Manufacturing
response.message: Hi Rahul, thanks for sharing your requirements. Improving inventory and production workflows for ABC Manufacturing sounds like a high-priority need. Since your timeline is within 2 weeks, our team can prioritize this quickly. One of our senior consultants will connect shortly to recommend the best-fit ERP solution for your operations.
